data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding per-value labels, descriptions, sort order, and active/inactive flags.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific attributes related to biz-defined status sets, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete examples or details demonstrating that these attributes are defined or utilized. While there are multiple passed steps related to offers and bookings, none of them explicitly confirm the existence or configuration of the required per-value labels, descriptions, sort order, and active/inactive flags. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of per-value labels, descriptions, sort order, and active/inactive flags being defined or utilized.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
